title: Post-046 Bounded Source/Test Trial Planning
objective: Plan exactly one next bounded source/test trial candidate after Packet 046 restored published authority parity, without executing source edits or treating authority publication as migration approval.
active_role: Olares Bounded Source/Test Trial Planning Operator
dependency_note: Packet 046 published Packet 044 and Packet 045 authority in commit `35d808ae3ef359e4e75544ddbd81ee2f8e3cef9e` and fast-forwarded `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity at that commit, but did not approve migration or immediate execution.
required_inputs: Current `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, commit, remote, and cleanliness
Packet 046 publication and host-mirror resync evidence
Current old-clone branch, commit, and status count at `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`
constrained_outputs: A planning handoff selecting exactly one bounded source/test trial candidate or explicitly deferring trial selection

A clear statement that Packet 047 does not authorize source edits, host-side execution, publication, host reconciliation, package mutation, runtime/service mutation, migration, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, remote rewrite, force/reset/clean, rollback, or old-clone mutation
If a candidate is selected, a separately authored next execution packet may be prepared but must remain unexecuted
validation_steps: Reconfirm parent-root status and distinguish Packet 046 closure drift from unrelated `.vercelignore` and older Packet 039 drift.
Reconfirm `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count without mutation.
Review the last two production-source trial slices and choose at most one next bounded source/test candidate with explicit file scope and validation expectations.
Keep migration approval and immediate execution closed.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no source edits, host-side execution, publication, host reconciliation, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, migration approval, force/reset/clean, rollback, or old-clone mutation. It authorizes only bounded planning and authority updates.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-04. Packet 047 reconfirmed `/home/olares/code/apex` clean at `35d808ae3ef359e4e75544ddbd81ee2f8e3cef9e`, observed `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` unchanged at `2836a2622309b4e146ca24f23b5bf87312c0c857` with `status_count=30`, reviewed the Packet 031 relay selection reset and Packet 040 apparatus clear-state source/test trials, and selected exactly one later bounded candidate: relay search criteria reset in `apps/operations-web/app/relay-resource-explorer.tsx` plus `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.smoke.spec.ts`. Packet 047 did not execute source edits, host-side changes, publication, host reconciliation, migration, runtime/service mutation, package or lockfile mutation, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, remote rewrite, force/reset/clean, rollback, or old-clone mutation.
next_action: Open only Packet 048 authority publication and host-mirror resync for Packet 046 and Packet 047 closure authority before any later relay search reset execution packet. Do not approve migration or execute source edits.
